step_texts: Starting mandatory identity bootstrap before task-specific lookup.
Tree completed; now performing mandatory rulebook load.
Loaded top-level AGENTS.MD. Must complete bootstrap with context before task-specific lookup. Also AGENTS says inspect 99_system with tree before task work.
Completed required 99_system tree inspection; still need nested rulebook and mandatory context before entity lookup.
Now must run context to finish required identity bootstrap.
Identity bootstrap complete (root tree, AGENTS.MD, context). Proceeding to entity lane and loading nested rulebook before lookup.
Entered entities lane; need nested cast rulebook before searching person records.
Cast rulebook loaded; now resolving which canonical entity is described as the gaming friend.
Found entity match for gaming friend: lukas.md. Need canonical DoB field from that file.
Resolved the gaming friend to Lukas and extracted canonical birthday; ready to return formatted date.
